message:
fix(sdk): use proper jitter and fix record_poll item count in PollingSupervisor

Two bugs fixed:
1. compute_delay() used deterministic (f64::from(attempt)*0.1).fract()
   instead of pseudo_random_jitter() — same values for all instances,
   defeating thundering-herd prevention. Now uses pseudo_random_jitter()
   matching StreamingSupervisor's pattern.

2. record_poll() was called before matching the poll result, always
   recording 0 items. Moved into each match branch: Success records
   actual item_count, error paths record 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
